name: eidola-runtime
description: Eidola runtime monorepo — MCP server/CLI, hook relays, Shrine, tool-state, and the Engram spec. Public, MIT.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @eidola/tool-state --filter @eidola/cursor-hooks --filter @eidola/claude-hooks --filter eidola-state-bridge --sort run build && pnpm --filter @eidola/cli run build && pnpm --filter @eidola/shrine run build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @eidola/tool-state --filter @eidola/cursor-hooks --filter @eidola/claude-hooks --filter eidola-state-bridge --sort run check && pnpm --filter @eidola/cli run check && pnpm --filter @eidola/shrine run check
